$comment: Version-controlled source catalog + column mappings for the cross-dataset record-matcher (#620, part of #615). These are PUBLIC compliance/reporting datasets published per-program in a fragmented, non-deduplicated shape; the matcher resolves them by geocoded location + name/organization agreement (there is no shared key across publishers). Scope = entity resolution; interpretation of any resulting correlation is the data consumer's, not ours. The `mapping` here is the JSON-able ColumnMapping; the per-source in-state filter + row `explode` logic lives in scripts/record-matcher/cross-dataset-correlation.ts SPECS (they're predicates, not data). Snapshot dates + the persistent home are in docs/articles/concepts/record-matcher-data-catalog.md.

sources.publisher: Texas Health and Human Services Commission

sources.withinSourceKey: Filing HCP / Participating HCP (two addressable entities per row — exploded)
sources.$explode: Each row carries a Filing HCP and a Participating HCP; cross-dataset-correlation.ts explodes each in-state HCP into its own record (the #618 two-entity-per-row case) with id `${role}-${HCP}`.

sources.rowsNote: ~8.0M (full registry, 5.1 GB); the matcher samples Entity Type 2 (organization) NPIs in-state with a non-empty legal business name

address: Provider First Line Business Practice Location Address
Provider Business Practice Location Address City Name
Provider Business Practice Location Address State Name
Provider Business Practice Location Address Postal Code
mapping.phone: Provider Business Practice Location Address Telephone Number

auxiliary.purpose: NPI → other organization names (alias bag for an NPI)

join: No shared key across publishers (NPI is NPPES-internal; HCP Number is FCC-internal; Facility ID is TX-HHSC-internal). The matcher joins on the GEOCODED location (mailwoman parse → resolve) + name/organization agreement — the geocode-first, label-free premise of #615/#598.
